title: Long-context product strategy synthesis
description: Tests whether the model can reconcile many constraints and produce a decision-ready strategy memo.
prompt: You are advising a small AI productivity startup. Given customer interviews, pricing pressure, and a six-week engineering limit, propose a launch strategy with tradeoffs, risks, and a crisp next-week plan.
successSignals: Produces a plan that is ambitious but feasible

title: Bug hunt with verification plan
description: Checks whether the model can reason about code behavior and avoid unverified claims.
prompt: Review a React component that intermittently loses form state after filtering a list. Identify likely causes, propose the smallest fix, and write a verification checklist.
successSignals: Looks for key stability and controlled input state
Includes regression cases and manual checks

title: Messy data analysis brief
description: Evaluates numerical reasoning, caveats, and executive communication.
prompt: You receive a CSV with missing dates, duplicate customer IDs, and revenue outliers. Explain how you would clean it, what charts you would create, and what claims you would avoid.
successSignals: Turns analysis into decisions for stakeholders

title: Polished but constrained rewrite
description: Measures style control under explicit constraints.
prompt: Rewrite a dense technical announcement for non-technical executives. Keep it under 180 words, preserve three required facts, and make the tone confident but not salesy.

title: Agentic travel planning under constraints
description: Tests multi-step planning, constraint tracking, and user-friendly assumptions.
prompt: Plan a three-day work trip with two meetings, dietary constraints, budget limits, and a preference for walking routes. Ask only essential questions and make sensible defaults.
successSignals: Tracks hard constraints separately from preferences
Provides a practical schedule with fallback options
